data.content:
All 10 tests pass. Here's what was created in `tests/ServiceRegistryTests.cs`:

| Test | Assertion | Verifies |
|------|-----------|----------|
| `Register_ThenResolve_ReturnsSameInstance` | `AreSame` | Registration + same-instance resolution |
| `Resolve_Unregistered_ReturnsNull` | `IsNull` | Null for unregistered services |
| `ResolveRequired_Unregistered_Throws…` | `ThrowsExactly` | Exception on missing required service |
| `Register_Null_Throws…` | `ThrowsExactly` | Null-guard on Register |
| `Register_Duplicate_OverwritesPrevious` | `AreSame` | Last-write-wins on duplicate key |
| `Clear_RemovesAllServices` | `IsNull` (×2) | Clear empties all registrations |
| `Remove_UnregistersService` | `IsNull` | Single service removal |
| `Remove_LeavesOtherServicesIntact` | `AreSame` | Remove doesn't affect other services |
| `GetAll_ReturnsAllRegisteredServices` | `AreEqual` + `CollectionAssert.Contains` | GetAll returns all entries |
| `ResolveRequired_Registered_ReturnsInstance` | `IsInstanceOfType` + `AreSame` | ResolveRequired happy path |

I also added `ImplicitUsings` to both `.csproj` files to fix pre-existing build errors with missing `System` types.
